title: airpure Air-O-Matic Air Freshener Refill, 250ml, Automatic Spray Fragrance for Home, Office, Kitchens and Anywhere for a Burst of Fresh Scent - True Romance Fragrance
description: Product Description "DECORATE THE AIR As part of the Airpure family of products, the Air-O-Matic air freshener refill offers high-quality fragrance at an exceptional value. You get a consistent mist of fresh scent to liven up whatever room you use it in. It’s 100% vegan and cruelty-free. Choose from a variety of scents. Enjoy our commitment to customer service with our 100% satisfaction guarantee. If you’re not entirely pleased with your purchase, we’ll gladly provide a replacement or refund.
